state.title: Run test to see failure details

part.text: The root cause is a bug in line 2 of `math.mjs`: it returns `a - b` but the test expects addition (`index + 2`). The test is correctly asserting `add(index, 2) === index + 2`, but the implementation subtracts instead of adds.

metadata.diff:
Index: /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-20T06-38-17-288Z/tokenwarden-large-test-log-debug-1/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
===================================================================
--- /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-20T06-38-17-288Z/tokenwarden-large-test-log-debug-1/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
+++ /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-20T06-38-17-288Z/tokenwarden-large-test-log-debug-1/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
 export function add(a, b) {
-  return a - b
+  return a + b
 }

===================================================================

@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
 export function add(a, b) {
-  return a - b
+  return a + b
 }

state.title: Verify tests now pass

part.text:
Fixed and verified.

**Issue:** `bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs:2` returns `a - b` instead of `a + b`.
**Fix:** Changed `-` to `+` in the `add` function.
**Verification:** `node --test bench-targets/large-log/math.test.mjs` — 80 tests pass.
